HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

17
21class PlaneWave : public IncidentField {
22 private:
23 cvec k;
24 dcmplx krho;
25 cvec p;
26 double z;
27 dcmplx zL;
28 rvec dir;
29 double incLayerZ;
30 int incLayerIndex;
31 GaussQuad<PlaneWave> gauss;
32 LayeredMediaUtils* layeredUtils;
33
34 public:
42 PlaneWave(dcmplx wvl, double eps, rvec dir, cvec po);
43
54 PlaneWave(std::vector<dcmplx> k_L, std::vector<dcmplx> epsL,
55 std::vector<dcmplx> muL, std::vector<double> zValsInterfaces,
56 std::vector<double> thickness, rvec propDir, cvec po);
57
59 ~PlaneWave() { if (layeredUtils) { delete layeredUtils; } }
60
66 cvec EvaluateE(rvec r);
67
73 std::vector<cvec> EvaluateLayeredEandH(rvec r);
74
80 cvec EvaluateH(rvec r);
81
87 dcmplx IntegrateE(RWGFun* f);
88
94 dcmplx IntegrateH(RWGFun* f);
95
101 std::vector<dcmplx> IntegrateLayeredEandH(RWGFun* f);
102
107 cvec Wavevector();
108
113 cvec Polarization();
114
121 void writeEHData(const std::vector<rvec>& points,
122 const std::string& eFilename,
123 const std::string& hFilename);
124
130 cvec rvec2cvec(const rvec& rv) {
131 return cvec(dcmplx(rv[0], 0.0), dcmplx(rv[1], 0.0), dcmplx(rv[2], 0.0));
132 }
133
140 rvec cvec2rvec(const cvec& cv, std::string& type) {
141 if (type == "real") {
142 return rvec(cv[0].real(), cv[1].real(), cv[2].real());
143 } else if (type == "imag") {
144 return rvec(cv[0].imag(), cv[1].imag(), cv[2].imag());
145 } else {
146 std::cerr << "Error: Invalid type for cvec to rvec conversion. Use 'real' or 'imag'.\n";
147 return rvec(0.0, 0.0, 0.0); // Return a zero vector in case of error
148 }
149 }
150
160 dcmplx complexSqrt(dcmplx arg) {
161 if (imag(arg) == 0) {
162 dcmplx buf(real(arg), 0);
163 arg = buf;
164 }
165 if (imag(arg) < 0) {
166 return -sqrt(arg);
167 } else {
168 return sqrt(arg);
169 }
170 }
171
176 bool IsPlaneWave() { return true; }
177
182 bool IsDipole() { return false; }
183
188 bool IsGaussian() { return false; }
189
195 virtual void setGrnFunLayered(GreenF *fGrnFields, std::vector<Grid> tabGrids);
196};
197
198#endif
